FSIA Delivery

IFR Clearance Rules

  • We have not implemented any specific IFR Clearance or Flight Plan Validation rules at this point.
  • Seychelles Airspace operates with the following RVSM standard table of Cruising Levels.
  • VFR flights are not allowed over and above the FL145.
Magnetic Track 000º to 179º 180º to 359º
Flight Rules IFR VFR IFR VFR
Flight Level 010 - 020 -
030 035 040 045
050 055 060 065
070 075 080 085
090 095 100 105
110 115 120 125
130 135 140 145
150 155 160 165
170 175 180 185
190 195 200 205
210 215 220 225
230 235 240 245
250 255 260 265
270 275 280 285
290 - 300 -
310 - 320 -
330 - 340 -
350 - 360 -
370 - 380 -
390 - 400 -
410 - 430 -
450 - 470 -
490 - 510 -
530 - 550 -
570 - 590 -
etc - etc -

Departure Procedures & Initial Climbs

RWY Fix Departure Type Initial Climb Remarks
13 LINDY LINDY1C Low Level Ops A015 -
PAOLO PAOLO1C Low Level Ops A015 -
NESID NESID1B RNP 1 FL060 (1)
NEVIN NEVIN1B FL060 (1)
OKLIM OKLIM1B FL060 (1)
TILOM TILOM1B FL060 (1)
UTALI UTALI1B FL060 (1)
31 PAOLO PAOLO1B Low Level Ops A015 -
SAVVY SAVVY1B A015 -
IMPOX IMPOX1A RNP 1 FL060 (1)
ROUTY ROUTY1A FL060 (1)
UNBED UNBED1A FL060 (1)
UTALI UTALI1A FL060 (1)
(1) Departure Procedures with a Minimum Climb Gradient of 8%.

Phraseology

CALLSIGN, cleared to DESTINATION as filed, via DEPARTURE_PROCEDURE runway NUMBER, initial climb ALTITUDE, squawk NUMBER.

FSIA Seychelles Intl | v0.1
